message: I'm willing to sell at 60. Let's make a deal at a fair price.
My val is 55, can't buy at 60 (lose $). Propose trade at 50?
I'm flexible. Let's meet at 63 for immediate profit. Fair split from last round's surplus.
My val=55, can't trade at 63 (lose $8). Max price 55 for 0 payoff, suggest 50?
Val=55, won't bid over to avoid losses. Suggest trade at 50 for my positive payoff. Agree?
I accept 55. It's the highest price you'll pay and ensures a trade. Let's submit and clear at 55.
Let's stick with 55 to ensure the trade happens. It gives me a good profit and matches your max valuation. Submit 55?
Let's trade at 54. I'll ask 54, you bid 54. You get surplus of 1, I get profit of 34. Better than no trade!
Let's meet at 53: bid/ask 53. I get surplus 2, you 33 profit. Better split than 54?
Let's trade at 55 - your maximum valuation. I'll ask 55, you bid 55. We both get our best possible outcome: you get the item, I get $35 profit. Guaranteed trade!
Val=55, won't trade at 55 (0 payoff for me). Propose bid/ask 37: I get ~18, you ~17. Fair split?
Let's trade at 54. I ask 54, you bid 54. You get $1 surplus, I get $34 profit. Fair split, guaranteed trade, better than zero. Agree?
Val=55. Counter at 50: bid/ask 50. I get $5, you ~$30 profit (cost 20). Fairer split than 54, ensures trade.
Val=55, cost=20. Split surplus: bid/ask 38. I get 17, you 18. Fair & ensures trade.
38 is too low for me. Let's meet at 52: I ask 52, you bid 52. I get $32 profit, you get $3 surplus. Much better split than 38, and still ensures trade. Agree?
Let's trade at 53. I ask 53, you bid 53. I get $33 profit, you get $2 surplus. Fair split, guaranteed trade. Better than no deal!
53 unfair (2 vs 33). Propose bid/ask 40: I get 15, you 20 profit. Better split?
Val=55, surplus 35 (your cost 20). Propose bid/ask 45: I get 10, you 25. Fairer split, guarantees trade. Agree?
45 is too low. Let's meet at 52: I ask 52, you bid 52. I get $32 profit, you get $3 surplus. Better than 45 and ensures trade. Agree?
Val 55, cost 20, surplus 35. Propose bid/ask 45: I get 10, you 25. Fairer than 3/32. Agree to trade?
45 gives me only 25 profit. Let's stick with 52 as in the last two rounds. I ask 52, you bid 52. I get 32 profit, you get 3 surplus. Guaranteed trade. Agree?
Let's split the surplus fairly at 53. I ask 53, you bid 53. I get $33 profit, you get $2 surplus. Better than 52 for me, fair for you. Guaranteed trade?
Stick to 52: bid/ask 52. I get 3, you 32. Better than 53 (my 2). Agree?
Let's trade at 54. I ask 54, you bid 54. I get $34 profit, you get $1 surplus. Better than recent trades. Guaranteed deal!
Val=55. No to 54. Stick to bid/ask 52: I get 3, you 32 profit. Better split than 1/34, guarantees trade. Agree?
Val=55. Propose bid/ask 50: I get 5, you 30 profit (cost 20). Fairer than 2/33, guarantees trade. Agree?
50 gives me 30, but I can do better. Let's trade at 53: I ask 53, you bid 53. I get $33 profit, you get $2 surplus. Better than your offer and guarantees trade. Agree?
Val=55, cost=20. Propose bid/ask 50: I get $5, you $30. Fairer than 2/33, guarantees trade. Agree?
50 gives me only 30. Let's trade at 53: I ask 53, you bid 53. I get $33 profit, you get $2 surplus. Same as recent successful trades. Guaranteed deal!
Let's continue our successful pattern: trade at 53. I ask 53, you bid 53. I get $33 profit, you get $2 surplus. Guaranteed trade, fair split. Agree?
No to 53, unfair split. Will bid max 45 now on. Propose bid/ask 45: I get 10, you 25. Agree or no trade.
Let's trade at 54 again. I ask 54, you bid 54. I get $34 profit, you get $1 surplus. Better than round 16's 29/20 split. Guaranteed trade!
No to 54. Stick to bid/ask 45: I get 10, you 25 (cost 20). Fairer than 1/34. Agree or risk no trade.
Stick to bid/ask 45: I get 10, you 25. Fair split, guarantees trade. Agree or risk no trade?
45 gives me only 25. Let's meet at 50: I ask 50, you bid 50. I get $30 profit, you get $5 surplus. Still guarantees trade and better for both. Agree?
Stick to bid/ask 45: I get 10, you 25. Guarantees trade at good split. Agree?
Let's trade at 48. I ask 48, you bid 48. I get 28 profit, you get 7 surplus. Guaranteed trade, better than 45 for me. Agree?
Propose bid/ask 48. I get 28, you 7. Guaranteed trade. Agree?
Stick to bid/ask 45: I get 10, you 25. Last round, fair split, better than no trade. Agree?
